status.pendingDesc: Customer has met time and payment requirements, and is awaiting verification.
status.failedDesc: Customer did not meet requirements or referrer violated the terms in getting the customer.
status.lockedDesc: Customer account is locked and no longer viable.
status.rejectedDesc: Trader Account has permanently failed to meet the requirements.
status.paidDesc: Referral has already been Paid in Full for this customer's signup.

faqPage.title: FAQ
faqPage.a1: We pay $100 flat commission per sale — one of the highest-paying referral programs in the bazaar!
faqPage.q2: 2. How long does it take for a sale to show up in my account?
faqPage.q3: 3. I just made a sale. Where can I see it?
faqPage.a3_step2: On the bottom right side you will see an option View Referral Kickback Page.
faqPage.a3_step3: Here you can see all of your awaiting-confirmation and approved commissions.
faqPage.q4: 4. I know someone who needs hosting. How do I earn a referral fee?
faqPage.a4_step2: Scroll down to the bottom to see your referral link.
faqPage.a4_step3: Send this link to your acquaintance that needs hosting.
faqPage.a4_step4: When they click on that link and place their order, you earn a commission!
faqPage.q5: 5. I've been approved for the InterServer Hosting Referral Kickback Program. Now what?
faqPage.a5_step1: Enter your Trader Account to access InterServer marketing materials by clicking Banners and Quick Links.
faqPage.a5_step2: Choose the marketing material you would like to add to your shopfront.
faqPage.a5_step3: You will see banner codes on the right side of all banners; copy and paste this code to your site.
faqPage.a5_step4: When someone clicks on that link and purchases a hosting account, you earn a commission!
faqPage.q6: 6. Can I PPC bid to promote InterServer Hosting?
faqPage.a6_line1: Yes, but please do not bid on our corporate name, variation of our corporate name, misspelling, or any keyword that contains a portion of it including InterServer, InterServer Hosting.
faqPage.a6_line2: Focus on bids for keywords like fast hosting, PHP hosting, WordPress hosting.
faqPage.a6_line3: Please contact us if you need help brainstorming keywords.
faqPage.a6_line4: Make sure to add InterServer, InterServer Hosting, InterServer.net, InterServer web hosting as negative campaign keywords.
faqPage.q7: 7. I've made a sale. Now when do I get paid?
faqPage.a7_line1: After 90 days a valid sale will change from status Default to Awaiting Confirmation.
faqPage.a7_line2: Once the sale is Awaiting Confirmation it will be Paid in Full during the first 7 days of the month.
faqPage.q8: 8. I have a pending sale that did not get paid.
faqPage.a8_line1: There might be a few reasons. Sometimes we need more time to validate a sale.
faqPage.a8_line2: One easy thing to check is to make sure your payment method is set.
faqPage.q9: 9. How long do my sales/commissions remain pending until they are approved?
faqPage.q10: 10. Can I use my referral link for self-referrals on accounts I'll use for personal use?
faqPage.a10: No Deal! Any contact with a resold account will result in automatic failure of the sale.
faqPage.a11_intro: Rejected means the commission has failed permanently.
faqPage.a11_reasons: Some reasons for this could be:
faqPage.a11_reason1: The customer has already signed up with us in the past.
faqPage.a11_reason2: The same payment method was used as another account.
faqPage.a11_reason3: The system detected that you, the referrer, are also using the customer's account.
faqPage.a11_policy: Since our payout of $100 per sale is often way more than we recover from the customer even after 1 year, we have a strict policy in place to catch referrals that do not meet our guidelines. If you are referring a friend or a customer, just give them a link or a coupon. Do not share payment types and do not use the account.
faqPage.a11_reviewTos: Also please review our referral terms here:
faqPage.q12: 12. I am a designer/developer and will refer customers. Is that okay?
faqPage.a12_line1: This plan is not going to work with us (or any other hosting referral program). Once there are matches made across multiple accounts, the commissions fail.
faqPage.a12_line2: This is done to prevent the same person from signing up and making money off our referral program by referring themselves.
faqPage.a12_line3: You might want to consider hosting the customers directly and bill them yourself using something like PayPal. You can buy a reseller hosting account from us and get started.
faqPage.q13: 13. Where can I set up my payment?
faqPage.a13: You can set up your payment,
